debug_info.goal:

inst✝² : OpensMeasurableSpace E
F : Type u_4

f : E → F
μ : Measure E
φ : TestFunction Ω ℝ ⊤
hf : LocallyIntegrableOn f (↑Ω) μ
⊢ Integrable (fun x => φ x • f x) μ

failed_attempts:
classical
  by_cases hφ : Integrable (fun x ↦ ‖φ x‖ * ‖f x‖) μ
  · refine (hφ.norm.mul_continuous? )?

classical
  by_cases hΩ : μ (Ω : Set E) = 0
  · have hμ : μ.restrict (Ω : Set E) = 0 := by
      ext s hs
      simp [Measure.restrict_apply, hs, hΩ]
    have hf0 : f =ᵐ[μ] 0 := by
      have : f =ᵐ[μ.restrict (Ω : Set E)] 0 := by
        simpa [hμ] using (ae_of_all _ (fun _ ↦ rfl))
      exact (Measure.ae_iff.2 <| by
        simpa [hμ] using (Measure.ae_iff.1 this))
    have : (fun x ↦ φ x • f x) =ᵐ[μ] 0 := by
      filter_upwards [hf0] with x hx
      simp [hx]
    simpa [Integrable.congr this] using (integrable_zero : Integrable (0 : E → F) μ)
